meta.title: Qrumi
meta.description: Alger Hsu's personal resume and portfolio site featuring backend engineering, CDN, and scalable systems work.

hero.description: I build high-performance, minimalist software architectures. Specializing in highly interactive front-ends and scalable backend topologies that bridge rigid structure with organic interaction.

resume.name: Kai-Jie Hsu
resume.aboutText: I am a computer engineer from Taipei, Taiwan. I enjoy programming, development, and solving problems, and I want to keep learning across different technical domains.

experience.cdnDescription: Extended and improved the existing AWS Terraform IaC codebase to increase infrastructure maintainability and cross-environment reuse.
experience.cdnBullet1: Extended and improved the existing AWS Terraform IaC codebase to increase infrastructure maintainability and cross-environment reuse.
experience.cdnBullet2: Adopted GCP into a multi-cloud strategy, building GCP infrastructure from scratch with Terraform and standardizing IaC development rules and deployment workflows across both clouds.
experience.cdnBullet3: Wrote Ansible playbooks to automate server configuration management and application deployment.
experience.cdnBullet4: Deployed and operated Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stacks across cloud nodes and services, including metrics collection, dashboards, alerts, and Telegram notifications.
experience.cdnBullet5: Diagnosed severe API latency issues, designed and implemented an APICache Service as a transitional solution, reducing response time to under 0.5 seconds.
experience.cdnBullet6: Led CDN architecture evaluation and technical selection, working with the team to define the final design and roadmap.
experience.backendDescription: Built data integration and processing systems with Golang, including web crawler development, automated information collection, storage, and independent backend modules and APIs.
experience.backendBullet1: Developed lottery data crawler and analytics systems to provide real-time lottery data and results, and built a lottery analysis site for traffic generation.
experience.backendBullet2: Built sports data crawlers and integrated paid third-party sources to provide real-time match data and launched sports analysis websites.
experience.backendBullet3: Independently developed index-lottery data crawlers and collection systems to expand new features and value-added services for the company’s main business platform.
experience.backendBullet4: Refactored the DWH project systematically to remove duplicate code, reduce coupling, and improve long-term maintainability.
experience.backendBullet5: Redesigned the crawler architecture to improve crawling efficiency, system stability, and expand data collection features.
experience.backendBullet6: Supported and contributed to backend development for wallet services.
experience.backendBullet7: Created automation scripts for repetitive art-team workflows, significantly improving efficiency and reducing human error.
experience.engineerDescription: Developed game frontend and backend systems with Egret, Cocos Creator, and TypeScript, and handled Linux server operations and maintenance.
experience.engineerBullet1: Worked with PM, 2D artists, and VFX artists to independently build multiple in-game systems and features.
experience.engineerBullet2: Developed reusable Slot game modules to speed up project delivery and helped other team members use them for new Slot titles.
experience.engineerBullet4: Built Python automation scripts to streamline the workflow from Photoshop assets to the game engine.

education.school: Takming University of Science and Technology (TMUST)
education.icpc: Actively participated in ICPC and CPE competitions
education.robotCar: Runner-up in the autonomous vehicle competition
education.thesis: Graduation project focused on a self-balancing vehicle system

projects.talkRealm: A web-based multi-user real-time chat application using Vue on the frontend and Golang on the backend, with basic chat and voice live-stream communication features.
